message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.describe, drop_duplicates_keep, and DataFrame.to_csv_options

- Series.describe() and describe_with_percentiles(): generate count,
  mean, std, min, percentiles, max statistics for numeric series
- Series.drop_duplicates_keep(DuplicateKeep): control first/last/none
  duplicate retention, matching DataFrame's existing API
- DataFrame.to_csv_options(sep, index, na_rep, columns): CSV export
  with custom NA representation and column subsetting

8 new tests, 836 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
